title: B.Tech in Electronics and Communication Engineering - JUIT
content: Electronics & Communication Engineering The Department of Electronics and Communication Engineering focuses not only on the fundamentals of Communication Engineering but also the basic engineering and field implementation aspects of analog and digital electronics. The courses are designed deftly to make the fundamentals of students strong to be able to pursue career in both industry and research with poise. To ensure that the courses remain pertinent to industry and cater to the needs of students, the department offers the following courses in Under-Graduate Degree Program: B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) : B.Tech. in Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) is designed to induce in students the ability to bring technological excellence using Innovation. At the core of the stream lie Digital Signal and Image Processing, VLSI and Microelectronics, Data Communication Networks, Microwave and Antenna, Embedded Systems, Internet of Things and its applications. ECE is a multi-dimensional branch and ECE engineers are highly in demand in most of the Public sectors (PSU’s) like Indian oil corp. Ltd., BHEL, BEL, GAIL, DRDO, ISRO, NTPC, HAL, BSNL, MTNL, Indian Railway etc. as well as in private companies such as ST Microelectronics, Samsung, IBM, Intel, Qualcomm, Cisco, Juniper, Nokia, British Telecom, Sony, National Instruments, Rockwell Automation and Texas instruments etc. B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Science (ECS) : B.Tech. in Electronics and Computer Science (ECS) is introduced with an increasing demand for engineers with good programming skills, proficiency in new industrial developments and use of the latest technologies such as Artificial Intelligence, Machine Learning, Data Science, Internet of Things, Cloud, Edge, Fog computing and Robotics. As the demand for programming-based courses is on an increase, major courses from Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE), as well as Computer Science Engineering (CSE), are included. ECS graduates will be strong in both hardware and software knowledge. A plethora of job opportunities will be offered to ECS graduates by major companies of ECE and CSE such as Mitsubishi, Nvidia, LinkedIn, Oracle, Infosys, TCS, Wipro, Deloitte, Accenture, Microsoft, Adobe, Google, Cisco to name a few. B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design & Technology) : B.Tech. in Electronics Engineering (VLSI Design & Technology) is initiated in alignment with the semiconductor policy of the Government of India under India Semiconductor Mission (ISM), Govt. of India. The GoI is encouraging the semiconductor companies to set up foundries and plants in India and foresees a requirement of trained manpower in the semiconductor Technologies, VLSI Design and allied areas. Through this program we aim to train and equip our undergraduate students with theoretical and practical knowledge and experience to make them ready to be able to contribute to the semiconductor industry ecosystem here in India. Major VLSI companies in India are Intel India, NXP Semiconductors, Qualcomm India, Texas Instruments in India, Synopsys India, STMicroelectronics India, ARM India, Analog Devices India, Broadcom India. The course curriculum is aligned with and is guided by the model curriculum provided by the AICTE, while retaining the flexibility to update as per the changing industry requirements. M.Tech.: The Program is offered with the following specializations : (a) Electronics and Communication Engineering (General) (b) Internet of Things (IOT) The Department also offers a: Doctoral Degree Program with major thrust areas of Internet of Things (IoT), Aerial Robotics, UAV, UGV, VLSI design technology, Computer Vision & Robovision, VLSI & Embedded System Design, 5G Communication, Software Defined Radio, Networked Control Systems, Applications of Internet of Things, Cognitive Radio, Cyber-Physical Systems, Smart Antenna and 5G Antenna Design, Applications of AI based Techniques, Genomic Signal Processing, Fusion of Medical Images. Scholars go through the curriculum sessions and then understand the nuances and nitty-gritties in well-equipped and modern laboratories. To ensure students have exposure to international universities curriculum and culture and develop a holistic approach, department facilitates ‘an exchange programme’ where the students visit top Universities, outside India, in the final year or semester of their degree. This widened horizon and thought process have consistently helped students to become successful entrepreneurs and pursue higher studies in top universities of India and Abroad; IITs, University of Texas, New York University, Ohio State University to name a few. Department is fully integrated with industry and the curriculum enables students to pursue successful professional in companies like BARC, ONGC, British Telecom, TCS, Infosys, Dell, Siemens, Mathworks, Ericsson India, Jindal Steels, Bosch, Tata Motors, Tech Mahindra etc. The Department has been actively engaged in research publications journals and research projects funded by external agencies like ISRO, DRDO, DST, etc. Teaching faculties have research collaborations with top universities in India and abroad for research-oriented projects. Masters and Doctorates from our department are currently working as faculty, post-doctoral fellows, and research scholars in IITs and in other reputed universities in India and abroad. Department organizes an IEEE international conference once in every two years. Other activities like workshops, seminars, hackathons, and expert talks are also organized by the department regularly. With an aim to nurture and develop the young minds ECE Department have Robotic and Technovatorz Clubs. Highlights: Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) with Mitsubishi Electric is one of the world’s leading names in the manufacture of electrical and electronic products and automation systems. Out of 251 total eligible participating students from last five year passing batches, 221 students received placements with attractive salary packages from leading recruiters like TCS, Wipro, Zscaler, Ericsson, Cognizant etc. Fellowship for eligible scholars including both M.Tech. and PhD. The students from M.Tech. have opportunity to complete their dissertation work in collaboration of industry during third and fourth semester. International exposure under Student Exchange program with top institutions like University of Florida, USA and Tampere University of Applied Sciences, Finland. Entrepreneurial incubation for students under TIED (Technology Incubation and Entrepreneurship Development) cell. More than 35 PhD awarded, and more than 25 PhD currently enrolled in the Department. 700+ research - oriented publications. Proficiencies in Machine Learning, Embedded Systems and Digital Image Processing is offered for its B.Tech. program. Minor degree program in ECE is offered for other B.Tech. degree programs.
